currentClaim: Bridge Documentation / Operator Guide v1 已 accepted：Threadsmith 现在有操作者指南说明跨 agent proposal -> review -> adoption plan 链路、manual adoption gate 和 no-auto-adoption 边界。

doneWhenChecklist.label: 新增 cross-agent bridge operator guide
